rule: I*ee^2*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[1]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[4]]]*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[2]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[3]]] + I*ee^2*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[1]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[3]]]*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[2]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[4]]] - (2*I)*ee^2*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[1]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[2]]]*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[3]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[4]]]

(-I)*ee*FV[1, Index[Lorentz, Ext[3]]]*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[1]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[2]]] + I*ee*FV[2, Index[Lorentz, Ext[3]]]*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[1]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[2]]] + I*ee*FV[1, Index[Lorentz, Ext[2]]]*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[1]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[3]]] - I*ee*FV[3, Index[Lorentz, Ext[2]]]*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[1]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[3]]] - I*ee*FV[2, Index[Lorentz, Ext[1]]]*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[2]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[3]]] + I*ee*FV[3, Index[Lorentz, Ext[1]]]*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[2]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[3]]]

((-2*I)*cw*ee^2*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[1]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[4]]]*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[2]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[3]]])/sw + (I*cw*ee^2*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[1]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[3]]]*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[2]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[4]]])/sw + (I*cw*ee^2*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[1]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[2]]]*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[3]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[4]]])/sw

gs*f[Index[Gluon, Ext[1]], Index[Gluon, Ext[2]], Index[Gluon, Ext[3]]]*FV[1, Index[Lorentz, Ext[3]]]*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[1]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[2]]] - gs*f[Index[Gluon, Ext[1]], Index[Gluon, Ext[2]], Index[Gluon, Ext[3]]]*FV[2, Index[Lorentz, Ext[3]]]*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[1]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[2]]] - gs*f[Index[Gluon, Ext[1]], Index[Gluon, Ext[2]], Index[Gluon, Ext[3]]]*FV[1, Index[Lorentz, Ext[2]]]*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[1]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[3]]] + gs*f[Index[Gluon, Ext[1]], Index[Gluon, Ext[2]], Index[Gluon, Ext[3]]]*FV[3, Index[Lorentz, Ext[2]]]*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[1]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[3]]] + gs*f[Index[Gluon, Ext[1]], Index[Gluon, Ext[2]], Index[Gluon, Ext[3]]]*FV[2, Index[Lorentz, Ext[1]]]*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[2]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[3]]] - gs*f[Index[Gluon, Ext[1]], Index[Gluon, Ext[2]], Index[Gluon, Ext[3]]]*FV[3, Index[Lorentz, Ext[1]]]*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[2]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[3]]]

I*gs^2*f[Index[Gluon, Ext[1]], Index[Gluon, Ext[3]], Index[Gluon, Gluon$1]]*f[Index[Gluon, Ext[2]], Index[Gluon, Ext[4]], Index[Gluon, Gluon$1]]*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[1]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[4]]]*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[2]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[3]]] + I*gs^2*f[Index[Gluon, Ext[1]], Index[Gluon, Ext[2]], Index[Gluon, Gluon$1]]*f[Index[Gluon, Ext[3]], Index[Gluon, Ext[4]], Index[Gluon, Gluon$1]]*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[1]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[4]]]*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[2]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[3]]] + I*gs^2*f[Index[Gluon, Ext[1]], Index[Gluon, Ext[4]], Index[Gluon, Gluon$1]]*f[Index[Gluon, Ext[2]], Index[Gluon, Ext[3]], Index[Gluon, Gluon$1]]*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[1]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[3]]]*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[2]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[4]]] - I*gs^2*f[Index[Gluon, Ext[1]], Index[Gluon, Ext[2]], Index[Gluon, Gluon$1]]*f[Index[Gluon, Ext[3]], Index[Gluon, Ext[4]], Index[Gluon, Gluon$1]]*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[1]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[3]]]*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[2]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[4]]] - I*gs^2*f[Index[Gluon, Ext[1]], Index[Gluon, Ext[4]], Index[Gluon, Gluon$1]]*f[Index[Gluon, Ext[2]], Index[Gluon, Ext[3]], Index[Gluon, Gluon$1]]*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[1]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[2]]]*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[3]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[4]]] - I*gs^2*f[Index[Gluon, Ext[1]], Index[Gluon, Ext[3]], Index[Gluon, Gluon$1]]*f[Index[Gluon, Ext[2]], Index[Gluon, Ext[4]], Index[Gluon, Gluon$1]]*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[1]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[2]]]*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[3]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[4]]]

((-I)*cw*ee*FV[1, Index[Lorentz, Ext[3]]]*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[1]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[2]]])/sw + (I*cw*ee*FV[2, Index[Lorentz, Ext[3]]]*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[1]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[2]]])/sw + (I*cw*ee*FV[1, Index[Lorentz, Ext[2]]]*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[1]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[3]]])/sw - (I*cw*ee*FV[3, Index[Lorentz, Ext[2]]]*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[1]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[3]]])/sw - (I*cw*ee*FV[2, Index[Lorentz, Ext[1]]]*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[2]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[3]]])/sw + (I*cw*ee*FV[3, Index[Lorentz, Ext[1]]]*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[2]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[3]]])/sw

(I*cw^2*ee^2*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[1]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[4]]]*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[2]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[3]]])/sw^2 + (I*cw^2*ee^2*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[1]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[3]]]*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[2]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[4]]])/sw^2 - ((2*I)*cw^2*ee^2*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[1]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[2]]]*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[3]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[4]]])/sw^2

((-I)*ee^2*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[1]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[4]]]*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[2]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[3]]])/sw^2 - (I*ee^2*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[1]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[3]]]*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[2]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[4]]])/sw^2 + ((2*I)*ee^2*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[1]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[2]]]*ME[Index[Lorentz, Ext[3]], Index[Lorentz, Ext[4]]])/sw^2
